_source: manually researched from official docs and anthropic-auth open-source implementations
_note: Anthropic OAuth uses PKCE (SHA-256). The token endpoint at console.anthropic.com is behind Cloudflare managed challenge; https://api.anthropic.com/v1/oauth/token is an alternative without Cloudflare protection. Two OAuth modes exist: 'max' (Claude Pro/Max subscription auth) and 'console' (API key creation). WARNING: As of early 2026, Anthropic has restricted OAuth tokens (sk-ant-oat01-*) to first-party apps only (Claude Code, Claude.ai). Using OAuth tokens in third-party tools violates Consumer Terms of Service and may return 401 errors.
